title: Masked-Entry Imputation of Low-Rank Clinical Cohort Records
strategies: trivial: column-mean imputation -- predict each masked cell as the mean of its column's observed entries (the evaluator baseline) -> ~0.1

greedy: k-nearest-neighbour patients -- standardize columns, find the K most similar patients that observed the target variable and predict their distance-weighted average; captures row similarity but not the full multivariate structure

strong: iterative low-rank matrix completion (SoftImpute / EM-PCA) -- repeatedly SVD-truncate the mean-filled standardized matrix, resetting observed cells, to recover the shared physiological factors; the measurement-noise floor leaves headroom below the score cap
invalid: emit a non-finite prediction -> rejected -> 0 on every instance
